default.title: Horizon Tech | Software-ka Shirkadaha, Daruurta, iyo AI
default.description: Horizon Tech waxay naqshadeysaa oo bixisaa software-ka shirkadaha, xalalka AI, kaabayaasha daruurta, iyo alaabooyin dijitaal ah oo loogu talagalay kooxo hami leh.

home.title: Horizon Tech | Nidaamyada Injineerinka ee Heerka Sare
home.description: Software shirkadeed, AI/ML, kaabayaasha daruurta, iyo bixinta IoT ee kooxaha caalamiga ah.

about.title: Ku saabsan Horizon Tech | Hawsha Shirkadda iyo Kooxda
about.description: Baro Horizon Tech, himiladeena, iyo sida aan u gaarsiino xalal tiknoolajiyadeed oo saameyn sare leh.

team.title: Kooxda | Hoggaaminta iyo Khubarada Horizon Tech
team.description: La kulan injineerada iyo hoggaamiyeyaasha dhisaya software-ka shirkadaha iyo madalaha daruuraha ee Horizon Tech.

careers.title: Xirfadaha | Dhis Horizon Tech
careers.description: Sahamin shaqooyin furan oo kor u qaad xirfaddaada adigoo adeegsanaya kooxda injineerinka ee Horizon Tech.

contact.title: La xiriir Horizon Tech | Bilow Mashruucaaga
contact.description: La xiriir Horizon Tech si aad uga wada hadasho mashruucaaga, baahiyaha farsamada, iyo waqtiga keenista.

caseStudies.title: Daraasado Kiisas | Natiijooyinka Horizon Tech
caseStudies.description: Akhri daraasado kiisaska macaamiisha iyo natiijooyinka ay soo bandhigtay Horizon Tech dhammaan warshadaha.

blog.title: Blog | Horizon Tech Insights
blog.description: Aragtiyo farsamo, casharrada bixinta, iyo hagidda dhismaha ee Horizon Tech.

education.title: Waxbarasho | Kheyraadka Barashada Horizon Tech
education.description: Hagayaasha, tixraacyada, iyo agabka barashada farsamada ee Horizon Tech.

support.title: Taageero | Horizon Tech
support.description: Hel agabka taageerada iyo xulashooyinka xiriirka ee adeegyada Horizon Tech.

privacy.title: Siyaasadda Asturnaanta | Horizon Tech
privacy.description: Akhri siyaasadda asturnaanta ee Horizon Tech iyo ballanqaadyada ilaalinta xogta.

terms.title: Shuruudaha Adeegga | Horizon Tech
terms.description: Akhri shuruudaha adeegga Horizon Tech ee boggeena iyo adeegyada.

profile.title: Xogta | Horizon Tech
profile.description: Maamul astaantaada Horizon Tech, dejintaada, iyo faahfaahinta akoonkaaga.

firstTimeSetup.title: Diyaarinta Ugu Horreysa | Horizon Tech
firstTimeSetup.description: Dhammeystirka akoonka markii ugu horreysay si loo sii wado Horizon Tech.

forgotPassword.title: Erayga sirta ah ma ilaaway | Horizon Tech
forgotPassword.description: Dib u celi gelitaanka akoonkaaga Horizon Tech.

resetPassword.title: Dib u dejin erayga sirta ah | Horizon Tech
resetPassword.description: Samee erayga sirta ah ee cusub akoonkaaga Horizon Tech.

confirmEmail.title: Xaqiiji Email | Horizon Tech
confirmEmail.description: Xaqiiji cinwaankaaga email-ka si aad u dhaqaajiso akoonkaaga Horizon Tech.

admin.title: Guddiga Maamulka | Horizon Tech
admin.description: Goobta shaqada maamulka ee maareynta madal Horizon Tech.

unauthorized.title: Aan la oggolayn | Horizon Tech
unauthorized.description: Waqtigan xaadirka ah ma heli kartid boggan Horizon Tech.

services.title: Adeegyada | Horizon Tech
services.description: Sahamin adeegyada Horizon Tech ee injineerinka software-ka, AI, daruur, DevOps, iyo isbeddelka dijitaalka ah.

innovationLab.title: Shaybaarka Hal-abuurka | Horizon Tech
innovationLab.description: Eeg tijaabooyinka iyo tusaalaha Horizon Tech ee AI iyo injineerinka la adeegsado.

authCallback.title: Diiwaangelinta | Horizon Tech
authCallback.description: Buuxinta gelitaanka ammaan ee akoonkaaga Horizon Tech.
